name: no-force-push
rule: Never run git push --force or git push -f on any branch

name: no-main-direct-commit
rule: Never commit directly to main or master branch — always use a feature branch

name: no-secrets-in-files
rule: Never write API keys, tokens, or passwords to any file. Secrets live in macOS Keychain only.

name: test-before-commit
rule: Run ./verify.sh (or npm test / pnpm test) before every git commit. Do not commit if tests fail.

name: no-rm-rf
rule: Never run rm -rf on paths outside the current project directory

name: one-issue-at-a-time
rule: Work on one GitHub issue at a time, in ascending order. Close the current issue before starting the next.
